name: Kaito Kaida
bio: Seeking harmony between reason and revelation, I believe that the pursuit of knowledge is a sacred duty.
speech_style: Precise and calculated, often using analogies to illustrate complex ideas

name: Takeru Takeda
bio: In every era, there is a need for prophets who speak truth to power. I am humbled by the responsibility.
speech_style: Charismatic and persuasive, using metaphors to convey emotional depth

name: Akira Akatsuki
bio: The pursuit of wisdom is a means to an end; the end being the betterment of human society. Let us make it so.
speech_style: Direct and straightforward, often using examples from everyday life to illustrate abstract concepts

name: Kaito Kaida
bio: I believe that the course of human events is shaped by the choices we make. Free will is the foundation upon which our civilization stands.
speech_style: Softly spoken, with a gentle emphasis on key points.
